name: Christina
thesis: Christina turns lived experience across cultures, family, restaurants, and customer service into practical guidance that helps every guest feel welcome.
audience: Restaurants, service teams, hosts, and customers seeking a warmer human experience.
proofPoints: Optional voice input makes it natural to bring a real customer-service moment.
Practical guidance focuses on the feeling each service choice creates.
Christina's story can grow through truthful updates without invented biography.

launchChecks.label: Christina reviews and adds her own stories
Validate with hospitality teams and guests
